description: Join Kirby and his Animal Friends on an adventure to collect Heart Stars and drive Dark Matter away from Dream Land!

kdl3_3.0.0-beta1.description:
# New Features
* Door Randomization courtesy of Generic Entrance Randomization
  * Door Shuffle requires Open World to be enabled, and will enable it.
* 3 new trap types:
  * Fast Trap
  * Ice Trap
  * Push Trap
* TrapLink support!
# Bug Fixes
* Fix stars in Cloudy Park 6 requiring the wrong ability
* Fix stars in Iceberg 4 not requiring Burning
* Fix Rick not being considered logical for Hibanamodoki

# WARNING:
While it is tested, it is still entirely possible that there are logic issues that are unaccounted for. It is not recommended to bring this APWorld to multiworlds where the host is not comfortable with potentially having to send locations.
kdl3_3.0.0-beta1.title: Kirby's Dream Land 3 APWorld v3.0.0 Beta 1
